message.content: There is a notification popup in the frame. It is a glowing, semi - transparent interface with a yellow - hued design. At the top of the popup, there is a circular icon with a symbol inside. Below the icon, there is text, and further down, there are two button - like elements, each with text and an icon. The popup appears to be floating in the air, and the overall design has a futuristic or digital aesthetic.
